title: Roulette
description: A Minecraft mod to play Russian roulette with your friends
body:
Bored? Why not pass around a revolver and take turns to see who can survive?

Made with Forge.

Pretty simple. Adds a revolver you can play Russian roulette with.



Press R to spin the cylinder.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0nq2sKzLnW0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Hold right click and release to fire like the bow.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/vBzMQMMmEIE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
It works how a real revolver would so if you keep firing you will eventually hit a loaded chamber if you don't spin the cylinder.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/h80Djk0ZtHg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Up to 8 rounds can be loaded and the gun can be emptied by R again.










YES YOU ARE ALLOWED TO USE THE MOD IN YOUR MODPACKS!
